section_id: 2002 POEA Rules - License Suspension Due to Derogatory Record
title: Effect of Derogatory Record Discovered After Issuance or Renewal of License
content: The license of a single proprietorship or a partnership shall be suspended and the appointment of any officer or employee with derogatory record may be cancelled or revoked.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
